content: Strategic Finance For Growth — The Intersection of Strategy and Finance in the Pursuit of Growth The through-line, in one thread 🧵
1/ Stage 1 — Start-Up You have been working on this idea for months. Maybe years.
2/ Stage 2 — Growth Your phone has not stopped ringing. Orders are coming in faster than you can fill them.
3/ Stage 3 — Maturity The champagne years are over. Your company has grown from a scrappy startup into a genuine market player, but the phone is not ringing as often as it used to.
4/ Stage 4 — Decline and Renewal The board meeting ended thirty minutes ago, but you are still sitting in your chair staring at the P&L.
From the Mangum sovereign-finance library — built for lasting, generational prosperity, not dependency. Full playbook on Amazon/KDP.
